name: Hold Fast
descriptionTemplate: Troop morale will not deminish. When there is friendly units nearby within 1 grid, evade X% damage dealt by enemy

progression.renderedDesc: Troop morale will not deminish. When there is friendly units nearby within 1 grid, evade 4% damage dealt by enemy
progression.renderedDescFr: Troop moral will not deminish. When there is unités alliées nearby within 1 grid, evade 4% dégâts dealt by ennemi

descriptionTemplateFr: Troop moral will not deminish. When there is unités alliées nearby within 1 grid, evade X% dégâts dealt by ennemi
longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Hold Fast » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Troop moral will not deminish. When there is unités alliées nearby within 1 grid, evade 20% dégâts dealt by ennemi ». Signature propre à un général : son niveau maximum conditionne la valorisation de la carte.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Hold Fast" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "Troop morale will not deminish. When there is friendly units nearby within 1 grid, evade 20% damage dealt by enemy". A general-specific signature: its max level drives the card's overall value.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Hold Fast“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „Troop morale will not deminish. When there is friendly units nearby within 1 grid, evade 20% damage dealt by enemy“. Eine generalspezifische Signatur: Ihr Maximallevel bestimmt den Gesamtwert der Karte.
